texto: I submit respectfully to the House as a general principle that our responsibility in this matter is directly proportionate to our power. Where there is great power there is great responsibility, where there is less power there is less responsibility, and where there is no power there can, I think, be no responsibility.
autor: Winston Churchill. In the House of Commons
explicacao: Citação de Winston Churchill. In the House of Commons sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I submit respectfully to the House as a general principle that our responsibility in this matter …” articula reflexao, power, principles em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como principles e responsibility.
